description: Inspect failing GitHub PR checks, fetch GitHub Actions logs for actionable failures, and extract a failure snippet to a JSON report (read-only).
rules: read-only: only reads PR/check/run state and logs; never pushes or mutates the repo
GitHub Actions only: a check whose detailsUrl is not a GH Actions run is labelled external and only its URL is reported
requires gh authenticated for the repo host (gh auth status) and a live GitHub PR
usage: Set REPO_DIR (path inside the target git repo, e.g. '.'). Optionally set PR (number or URL; defaults to the current branch PR), MAX_LINES, CONTEXT. Output: checks.json.
limitation: Not hermetic: needs the gh CLI authenticated against a live GitHub repo + the GitHub Actions API. When gh is absent or the repo/PR is unreachable, the porter degrades to an empty report and still exits 0. External (non-GH-Actions) providers like Buildkite are out of scope.
